title: v1.15 - Cleaned things up a bit
v1.14 - Back to the- past...
description: It is like the previous Changelog, but actually interactive!

title: v1.13 - New article editor
description: Ever since moving to the cloud, I have been usign a half put together system to write the articles, not anymore!

title: v1.12 - Comic strip but better
description: Now the comics are layed out in a natural fasion than just a boring old strip.

title: v1.11 - Better friend cards
description: Friend cards now expand to show more of their content!

title: v1.10 - iFrame Browser
description: Nobody is getting redirected from my site, NOBODY'S LEAVING >:3

title: v1.9 - UI Overhaul 2
description: Old UI was good, but now it has more character, my own recognisable style!

title: v1.8 - Pride update 🏳‍🌈
description: Few rainbow features in theme of Pride month
additions: Friends get their pride flag cards!

title: v1.7 - Nonogram!!!
description: Inspired by Sover the Games, added a Nonogram puzzle to the 404 screen.

title: v1.6 - Articles brought to the cloud!
description: It's always a hassle to write articles in plain HTML. Well, not anymore!

title: v1.5 - Things got a lot more lively
description: Things were still looking dull, so I went all in and made everything feel more alive!

title: v1.4 - Comic strip straight to the home page
description: Landing page was looking a little dull, so why not make it colorful with some comics?

title: v1.3 - Gallery more organised with tabs
description: It was kind of a mess with everything ranging from sketches to full illustrations just sitting in the same pile, so I added the tabs to seperate them.
additions: Thoughts tab and dynamic loading system

title: v1.2 - Expressing some grief
description: Added a little personal blog page to vent about some traumatic event
additions: Thoughts tab and dynamic loading system

title: v1.1 - Made things more compact
description: Handling white space better so things don't look quite so awkward.

title: v1.0 - First Full Deployment
description: No more placeholder links, the whole site works as intended.

title: v0.1 - Front Page!
description: First time one of my websites went live!
